items.prompt: Explain the significance of Kurtz's final words 'The horror! The horror!' in Part III of 'Heart of Darkness.'
keyPoints: Kurtz's realization of his own moral corruption
Reflection on the darkness within humanity and colonial exploitation
Symbolism of the darkness that pervades the novella
